benchmarkTarget.name: remote_pruner_payload_reduction
benchmarkTarget.producerNote: Local `context-pruner read` and `context-pruner grep` commands only produced the submitted payloads. The benchmark target is the remote transformation applied to the same `{code, query}` input.

cases.label: Small env-contract file window
cases.query: Keep only the env contract and alias behavior.

cases.label: Broader contract section file window
cases.query: Keep only the env contract, compatibility alias, request body, and primary response field.

cases.label: Already-clustered metadata grep
cases.query: Keep only the remote verification metadata and what it proved.

cases.label: Docs-only remote-contract grep
cases.query: Keep only the remote request shape and primary response field.

cases.breakpointNote: This window is already query-shaped, so the remote pruner should only help if it can still trim line-number noise or section framing.
cases.label: Small env-contract file window

cases.breakpointNote: This wider file window mixes examples, env guidance, request shape, and exit-code details, so it should show whether the remote pruner can strip surrounding sections.
cases.label: Broader contract section file window

producerOutput.stdout:
35: ```bash
36: context-pruner read --file-path path/to/file.ex --start-line 10 --end-line 30
37: context-pruner read --file-path path/to/file.ex --around-line 120 --radius 12
38: context-pruner grep --pattern "context-pruner" --path elixir/lib --context-lines 2 --max-matches 40
39: context-pruner bash --command "git status --short"
40: ```
41: 
42: Add `--focus "<question>"` to any command to request remote pruning before the
43: content enters model context.
44: 
45: ## Pruner environment contract
46: 
47: Primary variables:
48: 
49: - `PRUNER_URL`
50: - `PRUNER_TIMEOUT_MS`
51: 
52: Compatibility alias:
53: 
54: - `JEEVES_PRUNER_URL` is accepted only when `PRUNER_URL` is unset.
55: 
56: Timeout defaults to `30000` ms and is clamped to `100..300000`.
57: 
58: If pruning is disabled or the remote call fails, the CLI falls back to the
59: original unpruned output and emits a warning on stderr.
60: 
61: ## Verified request and response shape
62: 
63: Verified on 2026-03-18 against the remote service referenced in
64: `/work/jeeves/.env`:
65: 
66: - endpoint: `http://192.168.1.15:8000/prune`
67: - request body: `{ "code": "...", "query": "..." }`
68: - primary response field: `pruned_code`
69: 
70: Symphony also accepts `content` or `text` as compatibility fallbacks, but the
71: documented primary contract is `pruned_code`.
72: 
73: ## Exit codes
74: 
75: - `read`: `0` success, `1` file/runtime failure, `2` invalid CLI arguments
76: - `grep`: `0` matches found, `1` no matches, `2` invalid regex or filesystem/runtime failure
77: - `bash`: child exit code when the command runs, `1` launcher/runtime failure, `2` invalid CLI arguments, `127` no usable shell

rerun.compatibilityAlias: JEEVES_PRUNER_URL is accepted only when PRUNER_URL is unset.
rerun.defaultCommand: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix run --no-start scripts/measure_context_pruner_token_savings.exs
rerun.optionalDownstreamCommand: cd elixir && MEASURE_CONTEXT_PRUNER_INCLUDE_CODEX=1 mise exec -- mix run --no-start scripts/measure_context_pruner_token_savings.exs
